# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

resources:
  - name: vm1
    type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    properties:
      imageReference:
        publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
        offer: WindowsServer
        sku: 2022-Datacenter
        version: latest
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_D2s_v3
      osProfile:
        computerName: vm1
        adminUsername: <username>
        adminPassword: <password>
      networkProfile:
        networkInterfaces:
          - name: nic1
            properties:
              ipConfigurations:
                - name: ipconfig1
                  properties:
                    publicIPAddress:
                      name: pubip1
                      sku: Basic
                    privateIPAddress: 10.0.0.4
    location: <location>

  - name: pubip1
    type: Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses
    properties:
      allocationMethod: Dynamic
    location: <location>

outputs:
  vm1PublicIp:
    value: $(pubip1.ipAddresses.0)
